briefdescription.para: Symbol specifying the offset of interrupt bitmask for limits of all channels.
Symbol specifying number of LIMIT events per channel.
Symbol specifying the interrupt bitmask for limits of all channels.
Symbol indicating whether the configuration of acquisition time using predefined values is present.
Symbol indicating whether the configuration of conversion time is present.
Symbol indicating whether the configuration of linearity calibration coefficients is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC CAL trim config is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC CALREF trim is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of analog input using pin number is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel resistor control is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC positive internal inputs for pin number configurations are present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC negative internal inputs for pin number configurations are present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific burst mode configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC peripheral burst mode configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific chopping mode configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether VDDH/5 can be selected as SAADC input.
Symbol indicating whether VDD can be selected as SAADC input.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific highspeed mode configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 1/6.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 1/5.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 1/4.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 2/7.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 1/3.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 2/5.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 1/2.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 2/3.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channel specific gain can be configured to 4.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channels can be configured to use an internal reference.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channels can be configured to use VDD/4 as a reference.
Symbol indicating whether SAADC channels can be configured to use an external reference.
Maximum value of acquire time.
Symbol specifying maximum value of conversion time.
Symbol specifying maximum count of linearity calibration coefficients.
Symbol specifying maximum value of linearity calibration coefficient.
Symbol specifying minimum capture and compare value for sample rate.
Symbol specifying maximum capture and compare value for sample rate.
Symbol specifying internal 0.9 V analog supply rail as input.
Symbol specifying internal 0.9 V digital supply rail as input.
Symbol specifying VDD as input.
Symbol specifying AVDD_AO_1V8 as input.
Symbol specifying AVDD_AO_1V5 as input.
Symbol specifying DECB as input.
Symbol specifying VSS as input.
Symbol specifying VDD_AO_0V8 as input.
Symbol specifying VDDRF as input.
Symbol specifying VBat as input.
Symbol specifying Internal0 as input.
Symbol specifying Internal1 as input.
Symbol specifying Internal2 as input.
Symbol specifying Internal3 as input.
Symbol specifying disconnected analog input.
8 bit resolution.
10 bit resolution.
12 bit resolution.
14 bit resolution.
Resolution of the analog-to-digital converter.
No oversampling.
Oversample 2x.
Oversample 4x.
Oversample 8x.
Oversample 16x.
Oversample 32x.
Oversample 64x.
Oversample 128x.
Oversample 256x.
Analog-to-digital converter oversampling mode.
Bypass resistor ladder.
Pull-down to GND.
Pull-up to VDD.
Set input at VDD/2.
Analog-to-digital converter channel resistor control.
Gain factor 1/6.
Gain factor 1/5.
Gain factor 1/4.
Gain factor 2/7.
Gain factor 1/3.
Gain factor 2/5.
Gain factor 1/2.
Gain factor 2/3.
Gain factor 1.
Gain factor 2.
Gain factor 4.
Gain factor of the analog-to-digital converter input.
Internal reference.
VDD/4 as reference.
Reference selection for the analog-to-digital converter.
3 us.
5 us.
10 us.
15 us.
20 us.
40 us.
Analog-to-digital converter acquisition time.
Single-ended mode. PSELN will be ignored, negative input to ADC shorted to GND.
Differential mode.
Analog-to-digital converter channel mode.
Burst mode is disabled (normal operation).
Burst mode is enabled. SAADC takes 2^OVERSAMPLE number of samples as fast as it can, and sends the average to Data RAM.
Analog-to-digital converter burst mode.
Chopping mode is disabled.
Chopping mode is enabled, inputs will be switched on every second sample.
Analog-to-digital converter chopping mode.
Highspeed mode is disabled.
Highspeed mode is enabled.
Analog-to-digital converter highspeed mode.
Start the ADC and prepare the result buffer in RAM.
Stop the ADC and terminate any ongoing conversion.
Take one ADC sample. If scan is enabled, all channels are sampled.
Starts offset auto-calibration.
Analog-to-digital converter tasks.
The ADC has started.
The ADC has filled up the result buffer.
A conversion task has been completed.
A result is ready to get transferred to RAM.
Calibration is complete.
The ADC has stopped.
Last result is equal or above CH[0].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[0].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[1].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[1].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[2].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[2].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[3].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[3].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[4].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[4].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[5].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[5].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[6].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[6].LIMIT.LOW.
Last result is equal or above CH[7].LIMIT.HIGH.
Last result is equal or below CH[7].LIMIT.LOW.
Analog-to-digital converter events.
Interrupt on EVENTS_STARTED event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_END event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_DONE event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_RESULTDONE event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CALIBRATEDONE event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_STOPPED event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[0].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[0].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[1].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[1].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[2].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[2].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[3].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[3].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[4].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[4].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[5].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[5].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[6].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[6].LIMITL event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[7].LIMITH event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_CH[7].LIMITL event.
Mask of all interrupts.
Analog-to-digital converter interrupt masks.
Low limit type.
High limit type.
Analog-to-digital converter value limit type.
Analog input type.
Type of a single ADC conversion result.
Function for triggering the specified SAADC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SAADC task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified SAADC task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SAADC task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified SAADC task.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the SAADC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specific SAADC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SAADC event.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified SAADC event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SAADC event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified SAADC event.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given SAADC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given SAADC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given SAADC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given SAADC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given SAADC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given SAADC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the SAADC channel monitoring limit events.

parameterdescription.para: Channel number.
Low limit or high limit.

simplesect.para: The SAADC channel monitoring limit event.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SAADC_Type *p_reg, uint8_t channel, nrf_saadc_input_t pselp, nrf_saadc_input_t pseln)
memberdef.name: nrf_saadc_channel_input_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the input pins for the specified SAADC channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Positive input.
Negative input. Set to NRF_SAADC_INPUT_DISABLED in single ended mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the positive input pin for the specified SAADC channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Positive input.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the negative input pin for the specified SAADC channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Negative input.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SAADC_Type *p_reg, uint8_t channel, int16_t low, int16_t high)
memberdef.name: nrf_saadc_channel_limits_set

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SAADC channel monitoring limits.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Low limit.
High limit.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the configuration of SAADC interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Interrupts configuration to be set. Use nrf_saadc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified SAADC interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_saadc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_saadc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_saadc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for generating masks for SAADC channel limit interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: SAADC channel number.
Limit type.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the SAADC is busy.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks whether the analog-to-digital converter is busy with a conversion.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The SAADC is busy.
The SAADC is not busy.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the SAADC.

detaileddescription.para: The analog-to-digital converter must be enabled before use.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the SAADC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the SAADC is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The SAADC is enabled.
The SAADC is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the SAADC result buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the result buffer.
Size of the buffer (in samples).

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SAADC result buffer pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the result buffer.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the SAADC result buffer pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of samples written to the result buffer since the previous START task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of samples written to the buffer.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SAADC sample resolution.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bit resolution.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the SAADC sample resolution.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the oversampling feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Oversampling mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the oversampling feature configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the sample count needed for one averaged result for a given oversampling configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Oversampling configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the continuous sampling.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the SAADC internal timer to automatically take new samples at a fixed sample rate. Trigger the START task to begin continuous sampling. To stop the sampling, trigger the STOP task.

simplesect.para: The internal timer can only be used when a single input channel is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Capture and compare value. Sample rate is 16 MHz/cc. Valid CC range is from NRF_SAADC_SAMPLERATE_CC_MIN to NRF_SAADC_SAMPLERATE_CC_MAX.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the continuous sampling is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The continuous sampling is enabled.
The continuous sampling is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the continuous sampling.

detaileddescription.para: New samples can still be acquired by manually triggering the SAMPLE task or by PPI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting linearity calibration coefficient.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Coefficient number.
Value of the coefficient.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting linearity calibration coefficient.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Coefficient number.

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the SAADC channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Pointer to the channel configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the burst mode for the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number.
Burst mode setting.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring peripheral burst mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Burst mode setting.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the minimum value of the conversion result.

detaileddescription.para: The minimum value of the conversion result depends on the configured resolution.

parameterdescription.para: Bit resolution.

simplesect.para: Minimum value of the conversion result.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the maximum value of the conversion result.

detaileddescription.para: The maximum value of the conversion result depends on the configured resolution.

parameterdescription.para: Bit resolution.

simplesect.para: Maximum value of the conversion result.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting SAADC CAL trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trimming value

briefdescription.para: Function for getting SAADC CAL trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting SAADC CALREF trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trimming value

briefdescription.para: Function for getting SAADC CALREF trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
